name: tsParticles Confetti
when_to_use: 需要一次性礼花、炮筒、坠落或 emoji/card 等异形彩屑且还要精确控制发射物理时用它而非手写 canvas,因为原生在 emitter、粒子寿命、旋转与多形状组合上失败;只有普通彩纸爆炸时优先更轻的 confetti 包。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画一批同形矩形并给近似抛物线,做不到 emitter、shape plugin、逐粒子寿命/翻滚/摇摆的稳定协同;本包把完整 tsParticles 子引擎收进一个 confetti API。

data_in._why_no_example: 配置虽可扩展,但本条只暴露 confetti 的浅层原生参数,裁剪 schema 已足以一次拼对,不附 minimal example。
data_in.note: data_in.options 精确传给 @tsparticles/confetti 的 confetti.create(canvas, options);本条不是通用 tsParticles 背景编辑器,也不暴露底层 engine plugin 配置。

options?.decay?: number —— 速度衰减系数,默认 0.9
options?.flat?: boolean —— 是否扁平渲染,默认 false
options?.ticks?: integer —— 粒子寿命帧数,默认 200

position?.x?: number —— 画布宽度百分比,默认 50
position?.y?: number —— 画布高度百分比,默认 50

options?.colors?: string[] —— CSS 颜色列表,默认 ['#26ccff','#a25afd','#ff5e7e','#88ff5a','#fcff42','#ffa62d','#ff36ff']
options?.shapes?: string[] —— 已随 bundle 注册的形状名,默认 ['square','circle']
options?.scalar?: number —— 粒子缩放倍率,默认 1
options?.disableForReducedMotion?: boolean —— 系统偏好减少动画时停用,默认 true

spec.note: 自定义 canvas 必须有显式像素高度;默认 400px,宽度取容器 clientWidth(不可用时按 640px),禁用 vh/百分比高。

en.when_to_use: Use it for one-shot fireworks, cannons, falling pieces, or unusual confetti shapes such as emoji/cards when you also need precise emission physics, instead of hand-writing canvas code that tends to fail at emitters, particle lifetimes, rotation, and multi-shape composition. For an ordinary paper-confetti burst, prefer the lighter confetti package.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to same-shaped rectangles on approximate parabolas and cannot reliably coordinate an emitter, shape plugins, per-particle lifetimes, tumbling, and wobble. This package wraps a complete tsParticles sub-engine in one confetti API.

data_in.note: data_in.options is passed exactly to @tsparticles/confetti's confetti.create(canvas, options). This entry is not a general tsParticles background editor and does not expose low-level engine plugin configuration.

options?.angle?: number -- emission angle in degrees; default 90
options?.spread?: number -- fan spread in degrees; default 45
options?.flat?: boolean -- whether to render flat; default false
options?.ticks?: integer -- particle lifetime in frames; default 200

position?.x?: number -- percentage of canvas width; default 50
position?.y?: number -- percentage of canvas height; default 50

options?.shapes?: string[] -- shape names registered with the bundle; default ['square','circle']
options?.disableForReducedMotion?: boolean -- disable when the system prefers reduced motion; default true

spec.note: A custom canvas must have an explicit pixel height. Default is 400px; width uses container clientWidth, or 640px when unavailable. Do not use vh or percentage heights.

carriers.widget: supported:显式 canvas 落 shadowRoot,包内无 CSS/head 注入;需允许 jsDelivr ESM 与 canvas
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm(仅 6.5KB)为惰性包装,引擎副作用在代码分割 chunk(@tsparticles/engine 及 emitters/motion/shapes/updaters),未能逐块反编译→部分轴 unknown。boot 走 confetti.create(canvas) 传入 shadowRoot 内自建 canvas,按引用绑定,不走会 append 固定定位 canvas 到 document.body 的全局 confetti(options) 形态→globalDomMutation 倾向 no;canvas 2D 渲染自足→shadowCompatible=conditional(需 provided-canvas 路径且须补 fire 调用)。tsParticles Container 一般挂 window resize/visibilitychange 并随 burst life(ticks)结束自动 destroy,未逐块确认→globalEvents=unknown。无 head/style 证据但引擎 chunk 未验→globalStyleInjection 标 no(低置信)。
